name: Robin Spikie
comment: Spikie, a small, super fast LED WashBeam, which utilises a single 60W RGBW light source with a specially designed 110mm wide front lens producing a solid beam.

capabilities.comment: Rainbow effect (with fade time) from slow - > fast
Rainbow effect (without fade time) from slow - > fast
Multiply mode (multiply Virtual and Colour Mix)
Crossfade (crossfade between Virtual and Colour mix)

gwSpecs.description: Spikie, a small, super fast LED WashBeam, which utilises a single 60W RGBW light source with a specially designed 110mm wide front lens producing a solid beam.

revision.text: 2025-06-10  Pan tilt continuous physical data revision
